releaseNotes:
Release v0.7.0

New Features:
- Custom Python Nodes: load Python-defined nodes from a configurable directory with hot-reload, "Install from Git" dialog, palette integration with a Custom badge, and a Settings panel section with Python interpreter detection (PS-122)
- Refresh Nodes button in Custom Python Nodes settings (PS-122)

Bug Fixes:
- Fix settings modal

Improvements:
- Bump geo dependency
- Regenerated HTML node documentation including the custom Python nodes user guide (PS-122)
